title: 6 Key Reasons Why AI Projects Fail and How to Avoid Them
summary: A staggering 85% of AI projects fail to meet their objectives, and only slightly more than half successfully transition from prototype to production. This article delves into the primary causes behind these failures and provides actionable strategies that your organization can adopt to avoid common pitfalls. Artykuł 6 Key Reasons Why AI Projects Fail and How to Avoid Them pochodzi z serwisu DLabs.AI .
author: Katarzyna Rojewska
